hooks.prompt: Before ending: Did you complete any ADO work items (user stories, features, epics) during this session? If so, remind the user to update them in Azure DevOps (move to Done + add completion comment). List the specific work item IDs and suggested comments.

Before ending: Did the work in this session change the status of any features, epics, or milestones? If so, remind the user that docs/theBigPlan/TheBigPlan.md and .claude MEMORY.md may need progress updates.
